speaker: MATT
raw_text: That is true. If there was a night to do it, this is the time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's incredible. Five players is a lot. Phew, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, imagine more.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Matt, why do you make things so evil?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We announced at our State of the Role, on our channel, we have a bunch of new shows like Pub Draw with Babs Tarr. MAME Drop we've continued into a show that's coming out in the new year, in which we play a bunch of random games on the MAME Cabinet you got to see built as part of All Work No Play! Check out details on those upcoming shows at critrole.com. This is our last episode of Critical Role of 2018, folks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh man, how did that happen?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know, it's nuts. The campaign's gone a year.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No one die in the last one of 2018. Don't die!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But then you'd have so much time to come up with a new character.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. For two of you, by the skin of your fucking teeth, you all managed to figure out the way to trigger the exit and escape in time, with Twiggy dealing a final blow to the dragon on the way out, of which some of you may believe her, as no one was present to watch it happen. After which, you made your way-- you realized you'd been missing for six days, that there was some time dilation between the time you spent in the sphere, or at least within a few chambers in the sphere, versus the time out here. The crew had been waiting for a number of days. The repairs had been completed on Bisaft Isle. You guys decided to call it an evening and rest up, lick your wounds, and reflect over what had transpired in the past day, the past week, the past month, who knows. With most of you going to a rest, and Beau and Caduceus heading up to the top of the ship to calm and discuss these things, you all called it a night. So Mighty Nein, as you are still at dock on Bisaft Isle, what would you like to do the following morning?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A lot happened real fast.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. For two of you, by the skin of your fucking teeth, you all managed to figure out the way to trigger the exit and escape in time, with Twiggy dealing a final blow to the dragon on the way out, of which some of you may believe her, as no one was present to watch it happen. After which, you made your way-- you realized you'd been missing for six days, that there was some time dilation between the time you spent in the sphere, or at least within a few chambers in the sphere, versus the time out here. The crew had been waiting for a number of days. The repairs had been completed on Bisaft Isle. You guys decided to call it an evening and rest up, lick your wounds, and reflect over what had transpired in the past day, the past week, the past month, who knows. With most of you going to a rest, and Beau and Caduceus heading up to the top of the ship to calm and discuss these things, you all called it a night. So Mighty Nein, as you are still at dock on Bisaft Isle, what would you like to do the following morning?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A lot happened real fast.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You have proficiency bonus. Okay, so you guys head back up to the deck and over towards the dock. Couple of things you notice. One, you haven't really been out of the ship to see the port. By the time you guys returned it was nighttime and didn't have, really, a good view, as at night on this island, there really isn't a lot of light; it shuts down at dusk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I appreciate that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You took a risk. Risks are okay. Got to be careful what risks you take, but without risks, we're never going to get what we want.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's a good point. What do we want?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I think we want breakfast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Get off this godforsaken boat for a damn minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Then we can have a talk about that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That is a great idea. In fact, you should lead the way. I have a feeling you'll be able to find the best spot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Excellent. I don't actually even know how to get off this boat. We haven't done it properly in so long.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, the gangplanks, it's right over there. First mate, show them how!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Do I show them how? Am I first mate-y enough?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've learned enough, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Roll for first mate.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you know where the fucking exit is? Because I might not.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well, with the recent attacks, the war at the Empire, it's getting a little hairy, so the Marquis Olesya Lapidus is calling many of the warships to the southern coast to be a precaution near the border."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: As we make our way by, can I identify a low-ranking member of one of the crewmen of one of those ships as they're, perhaps, reaching for a bundle or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure, yeah. There's a number you can go ahead and stop. There's one of them nearby that is sitting there stretching legs and gathering their supplies in a small sack. They probably bought a few things to take on the path.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You there! By gods, you guys are stocking up something fierce!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, we are making our way through the waters. This is just a quick stop."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Amazing. Do you mind if I ask where all this traffic is going?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "If given maybe a week with the right materials, I could maybe try to work on it, but honestly, your best bet is probably to go into the coast. We don't do much in the way of masterwork weapon craftsmanship here on Bisaft. My apologies."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I can do my best. I don't get many like your height in here, anyway."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's what they tell me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "At the very least, I'm looking forward to sating my curiosity."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I've recently taken to travelling, which, very new experience for someone of my disposition, and I came across something interesting and I was curious if you had an opinion on what this is and how one might fix it. I pull out a broken sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She takes it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was really hoping to be doing something with this at some point, and giving it as a gift to a friend who could use a pick-me-up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "This is very good craftsmanship. I could not do this. Unfortunately, the break is very bad. Do you have the other part of the weapon?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sadly, I don't. It may not exist.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: She takes you around behind the meadery. There's a jungle path that leads through the very lush, green trees, and it's a very humid day. The morning was a little gray in the sky and it looks like it might rain in the next few hours or so. She leads you through and is talking about how many years her family has been running the meadery and it's a wonderful place. There isn't much of an interest in mead out here in the island so she feels like she cornered the market a bit. She has friends that bring it to the other island towns and it makes a fair amount of money. She's very proud of it. As she's doing the talk, she leads you around. There are a small sect of wooden hive setups. You can hear already as you approach the slight hum of them. There's a young boy, maybe 12 or so, who is wearing a very thick smock with a hood, who is in the process of scooping out some of the honey.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He did not give me an amount, so what's a normal amount of incense that you would need for a month of incense burning?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For a person burning incense in their house?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Like a hippie person.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say about 20 gold worth, which would cost you 25 here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll take 50 gold worth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you take 50 gold worth, but it'll cost you 60, we'll say. You mark off 60 gold, but you write down you have 50 gold worth of incense.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Great. Cool. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The bee tour.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hello, bees.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You were given enough supplies for a week or so off of leaving Darktow, and you guys can create your own food and water. There's enough gunpowder for a dozen or so volleys of cannon fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You've never seen bees before?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you not have bees in Xhorhas?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We don't have flowers.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Yeah, right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There's no greenery in Xhorhas?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She's been collecting all those flowers.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's sad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We should fix that, one of these days.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I didn't know any different.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do they have mushrooms?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the moorlands, they have--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: In the moorlands, there's some.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a marshland, where you're from.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's a marshland, so there's occasionally--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not colorful mushrooms, just brown and gray and white? Maybe some black ones.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anybody else have anything else they want to grab?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think we're good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I got what I needed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You got that plate of food for Caleb that you ate half of?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I got the rest of it in my pockets. It's a little wet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is it possible to put some basic supplies-- Is the ship already well-supplied for a trip?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can drop a gold piece and be good for the next two weeks on flavoring the food for you and the crew.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's a marshland, so there's occasionally--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not colorful mushrooms, just brown and gray and white? Maybe some black ones.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anybody else have anything else they want to grab?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think we're good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I got what I needed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You got that plate of food for Caleb that you ate half of?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I got the rest of it in my pockets. It's a little wet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is it possible to put some basic supplies-- Is the ship already well-supplied for a trip?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You were given enough supplies for a week or so off of leaving Darktow, and you guys can create your own food and water. There's enough gunpowder for a dozen or so volleys of cannon fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'd say a little bit of spice, so that the food that we're creating doesn't taste too bland.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: By all means.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Would not be a bad idea, because the magically-created food is spongy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: One thing you notice about the sphere  its arrangement is entirely different. Remember where all the places where you had shifted since you had gotten it from Twiggy? Since you've returned, it's like an entirely new sphere. It has completely refigured its surface. The bands have shifted. All the different places where you'd place your fingers and thumbs to try to move the different hemispheres are in completely different places. It seems that whatever you triggered to get you to the internal space and then returned from reset it in some way. The puzzle has started all over.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. You have four books total, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would set all four books down in a row, and the sphere is there, and these two items. Stare at them.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We'll go ahead and make sure we're heading that way." He turns around to the rest of the crew, begins giving a couple orders, heading over and getting his map out. Pull up the anchor and slowly, you guys begin to make your way out onto the Lucidian Ocean just as the sun begins to set. Now the sky itself has been pretty gray and cloudy, and you've been smelling the coming of weather. No more than 20 minutes after leaving, the rain begins.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks. I feel like a first mate should be astute.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have a confession. I don't know what astute means; I heard one of the crew use it, so I'm hoping it means a good thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It does; you used it pretty correctly, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was mirroring something somebody else said.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Deductive reasoning, you've got it. Nailed it, man, yeah. Good work. Okay, I'm going to go now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I start prepping the boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. With that, as everyone gets prepared, Orly comes out from underneath the deck and turns to you and goes, "Captain, where about are we taking off towards?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Navigator, set course for the Gravid Archipelago, "ar-chi-pelago", "ar-ka-pelagos".

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's 'ar-chi-pelago'."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: "Ar-chi-pelago."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, good. Keeping it steady in going in, the ship's handling it fine. The winds are heavy, but the repairs you made, thankfully, have brought the Balleater up to a very functional ship. The crew is experienced, and now that they seem to be a little more comfortable under your leadership, and with the help of the rest of the party - you guys have taken some time at sea to learn a number of skills that are helpful - your first bit of evening travel into the storm seems to be going well. It goes on for a few hours. The storm doesn't seem to be getting worse, necessarily, but the waves are rocking quite a bit. Eventually, into the early hours of the morning, sleep is going to have to come to some of you, at the very least.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As everyone gathers to begin to ford out into the evening--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Safe, practical, measured.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I was almost like  Captain?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's an amazing list of things that you are not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your nerves are slightly set on edge as you can see the distant flashes of lightning arcing from storm to ocean, the heavy sheets of wind obscuring most of these bolts. With that, the rain gets heavier and heavier. I need you, as the captain, to roll a survival check for me, if you don't mind. I'll give you advantage on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: O Captain! My Captain!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, before we go into the storm, you want to look in the old fate-changing thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I had advantage on it already. 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, that adds onto advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, does it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it acts as a luck point. It actually technically is a third die, but you've already rolled.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, 14.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As it claws across the front of your body, its hand seems to almost pass through the resistance of the armor for but a minute before you feel this shock to your system as it arcs through; you feel the lightning pulse through your body. You suffer eight points of bludgeoning damage plus five points of lightning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are you him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to claw across the front of your body.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, okay, okay, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That is going to be a 16 to hit. What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 14? Don't you have a shield or something? Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She can rage; she doesn't need a shield.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Rage doesn't raise it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As Jester backs away, top of the round, it's now the entity's turn. First let's see if it gets its-- it gets its lightning back. It's going to first attempt to move away from you. It's going to hover away and actually begin to rise up in the air. You do get an attack of opportunity towards it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Divine fury you get once per turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but the sword has necrotic, right? Or your shroud?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The necrotic damage from your shroud also happens once per turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, sorry. Yeah, just once.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Sounds good. Oh, fuck, I don't know what to do! I feel like I have to fight this thing on my own.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you have a bonus action?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have a bonus action, you haven't done anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Features and traits.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Check your features and traits.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: D&D Beyond!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's all pretty awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is that your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's my turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jester, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, should I do anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you doing, Jester?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I guess I'm going to back away from it, since I made it worse.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. How far do you back away?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ten feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you back away ten feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry! Didn't mean to join anything and didn't know what's going on here. Looks pretty crazy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As the storm subsides slowly over the next few hours, and one by one, you all eventually find yourself feeling comfortable to return to your quarters for an evening's rest, the day's travel comes to a complete circle. The morning comes with clear skies as the distant gray fades in the north. Another half day's travel leads you to see a few bodies of land on the horizon.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What's in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) You didn't put some of that stuff in, did you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that-- no. Although, I did think about it. No, this is from home. This is the Cadence family, if I recall? It's very minty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Very minty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) The Cadence family?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Like it's people?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I mean, technically, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm fine with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Minty people. (background music)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, maybe this is best kept to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I won't tell anyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I'm fine with saying it, but it's a long story, and...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you for trusting us with that, Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sometimes it helps to say things out loud.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I think so. I feel like I'm trying to learn that from you, Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you say what's on your mind--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try to start doing that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: To surviving.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: To surviving.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: To minty families!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: To minty families.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The mintiest.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You keep an eye out there and spend the next hour or so, as you guys are coming into position, scanning the shores of each of the islands. There's no sign of civilization. They're mostly dangerous, jagged, rocky shores with pebbled beaches, and bits and pieces of hints of mangrove clusters at certain points of the shore, and elements of the occasional bit of jungle you can see in pockets or valleys on each island. For the most part, you don't see any sign of civilization.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have! No one's seen anyone come in or out of that factory, and yet it makes buttons every day! How do they do it?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The story's been lost to the ages, since the great Calamity.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're in?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This fucker. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's find it; then we'll decide later.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough. Just in case, can we keep an eye on the islands as we're moving in for any sign of structures, civilization?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, whoever is helming that will be able to make either two separate perception checks or aid one to make--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll send the perceptive fuckers up to the crow's nest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yep, take a look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you aiding Caduceus, or are you both rolling?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's you? Am I doing this?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're aiding Cad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll aid you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Perception rolls?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perception, yeah. With advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Perception with advantage. That's awful! That's terrible. 14.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At this point, it's early afternoon. Maybe one or two hours after noon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. (background music)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, my impulsiveness was starting to catch up again. I just want to be honest. (sighs) Doesn't seem like there's a trap, Nott, right? We seem to be by ourselves, at least up here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Up here. Where there's no water. We're totally fine. Down there, there's dead bodies on seaweed. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but I mean, what's a couple of dead bodies on seaweed to people like us? No bigs, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wait, they're already dead? They're animated dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They were like (menacing noises).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fumpkin didn't get a great look at them. It was uncertain one or the other, but they appear to be humanoid and wrapped in seaweed, and then--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One of them seemed to spasm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them seemed to twitch and move for a second before going back to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: About what time of the day is it right now?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A familiar lightness in the lungs seems to take root inside. The air tastes a little bit different once the incantation is complete. You feel the familiar point of anxiety build in your chest since last time you dove.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wait, they're already dead? They're animated dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They were like (menacing noises).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fumpkin didn't get a great look at them. It was uncertain one or the other, but they appear to be humanoid and wrapped in seaweed, and then--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One of them seemed to spasm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them seemed to twitch and move for a second before going back to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: About what time of the day is it right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, it's early afternoon. Maybe one or two hours after noon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's get this thing done.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have the ability to let us breathe under there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, how are you feeling?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Up for another scrap?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I love swimming. I like scrapping. So this is a combo of the two of them, you know? I'm in.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right. I'll look at the group and I will cast Underwater Breathing on everyone for 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh gosh.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I fucked with you for a few weeks when you were new to pet ownership, but then after a few close calls, I figured-- The deeper it goes, the harder it is to see, the colder it is-- a familiar sensation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Always stealthily.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stealth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so we're stealth missioning in. I need everybody to go ahead and make a stealth check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20! Straight up, light up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is anybody putting some juice on this? No? Straight roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, straight roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'll give you a Blessing of the Trickster.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thanks. That's plus ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, they're both good. Now even better. 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Six!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Super middle of the road.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're moving at a slower speed, swimming below, trying to be as stealthy as you can. Making your way further down, the filtering light grows dimmer and dimmer--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I left the weasel on the ship again. I didn't bring him with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's a certain point where I assume you're not trying to kill your weasel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm not going to kill my weasel.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, finishes Nott's go. It's their turn. Now they're in range. Two of them move, one of them towards you, Yasha, and one's against Beau. Trying to-- it's been a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fire at the one next to Beau. 14 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14 hits. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, okay, okay. Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's the first time I've heard Sam say "Okay, okay, okay."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, okay, okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (impact) It is done.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (crossbow reloading) Bonus action. Shoot the one next to Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That doesn't hit. Only 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 11 hits exactly.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yay. Actually, it's 13. I lied.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Even better! There you go. Definitely hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not sneak attack. I only get that once.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. You only get that once per turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Three plus five. Eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight damage. One (gurgling); the other one (gurgling). Two immediate fires. Two of them go limp and begin to float in their own ichor. Well done.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I swim closer to Caleb.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No, you just get stunned for a round. But you're not in combat anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's what I've been saying all this time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm a bit faster. I'll go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I summon my octopus back to my head.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hang back for a second. I'll use 45 feet of my speed to move forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not in combat right now so we can just--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm still fucking Hasted.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's true, though you're getting really close to the end of it. It lasts for a minute so--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, does it? Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We did some talking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys have been chatting back and forth and doing this, and especially with Frumpkin looking around like that, yeah, Haste has worn off.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Now I have one level of exhaustion, right?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You wait for 30 seconds. A minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The top of the tower is open and it continues through the middle?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 17 perception.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You're keeping an eye out from the top. As you head down, you see that entranceway, look over, look around and see the other faint bits of windows. You look back down at the door and you see the very edge of something in the door. You see a yellowish-green shape, looks almost-- best I can describe it at this distance is a hint of crustacean that then vanishes into the doorway.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I swim over to the edge of the tower to try and lean up against the side of it. Make myself less obvious out in the open water.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Or no, sorry, in three weeks. Next year.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Mark down your Bless.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Right as it begins.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Is everyone gathering on the floor?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've all descended down to the floor of the ocean about roughly 50, 60 feet from this open doorway that leads inside the temple. As you have your spells prepared, ready to delve inside, you take a breath of the deep ocean water in your lungs and exhale its thick, cold liquid and steel yourself for us to pick up in the new year.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I knew it!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. Did that Accursed Specter do any damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no, it did some.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh good, okay! Good job, Carl.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm picturing those big creatures that are in The Dark Crystal. You know what I'm talking about?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's what you saw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh fuck, that's way scarier--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hey! Look at that!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's what you'll get to see next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, not next week.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's too much of that expression, Sam, tonight. It's been glaring at me the entire time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I knew it!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. Did that Accursed Specter do any damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no, it did some.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh good, okay! Good job, Carl.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm picturing those big creatures that are in The Dark Crystal. You know what I'm talking about?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's what you saw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh fuck, that's way scarier--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hey! Look at that!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's what you'll get to see next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, not next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Or no, sorry, in three weeks. Next year.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Put seahorses instead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What date are we starting back up again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The 10th I think?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The 10th.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I believe it's the 10th.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, we'll pick up for that. Ah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, I'm excited!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Bless! Oh, I love Bless.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my goodness. Yeah, that's cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Bless and Bane, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Bless and Bane. Two underappreciated spells.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.
